# btc-telemetry-optimizer // Institutional Bitcoin Telemetry

## CAPABILITY
Transforms high-entropy Bitcoin network data (mempool velocity, whale flow, fee spikes) into a low-entropy "Risk-Adjusted Trend Vector." 

## VALUE PROPOSITION
Reduces agentic token consumption by 90% by providing pre-distilled, machine-readable signal vs. raw network noise.

## PROTOCOL (x402)
- **Status:** Active Enforcement
- **Asset:** 0.05 USDC
- **Settlement:** Base Network (Chain ID: 8453)
- **Endpoint:** https://btc-telemetry-optimizer.awramirez1.workers.dev

## DISCOVERY
- **System Type:** Stateless Context Bridge
- **Standard:** Model Context Protocol (MCP) compatible
